task_completion.description: Create the inner and outer arcs of the C-clamp profile
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D sketch in SolveSpace showing two concentric arcs or circles. Look for dimension labels of '50' (outer radius) and '30' (inner radius) near the origin.

task_completion.description: Draw the horizontal arms of the C-clamp extending to X = 40
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D sketch includes horizontal lines extending to the right, forming a 'C' shape. The top arm should have horizontal lines at Y=30 and Y=50, and the bottom arm at Y=-30 and Y=-50.

task_completion.description: Extrude the 2D C-clamp profile into a 15 mm thick 3D solid
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D sketch is converted into a 3D solid object. The SolveSpace property browser (usually on the left) should show an extrusion group with a depth/thickness of '15'.

task_completion.description: Sketch the 10 mm diameter hole on the top arm
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circle sketched on the top arm of the C-clamp. Look for a dimension label of '10' (diameter) or '5' (radius), positioned horizontally in the middle of the arm (X=25).

task_completion.description: Cut the hole vertically through the top arm
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model shows a cylindrical void (through-hole) passing completely through the top arm of the C-clamp.

task_completion.description: Save the model as c_clamp_frame.slvs in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar displays 'c_clamp_frame.slvs', or a save dialog/terminal confirms the file was saved to '~/Documents/SolveSpace/c_clamp_frame.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SolveSpace application interface with the 3D viewport, property browser, and toolbar being actively used, rather than just a text editor writing the .slvs file.

integrity.description: The model is a genuine 3D object manipulated in the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The viewport should show the model from 3D perspectives (isometric views) with proper shading and SolveSpace's native grid/axes, not an imported 2D image.

integrity.description: The agent built the model step-by-step rather than opening a pre-made file
integrity.visual_evidence: The property browser (text panel on the left) should show a history of groups being created (e.g., Sketch in workplane, Extrude, Sketch in workplane, Step Translating) sequentially across screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/c_clamp_frame.slvs. Outer radius: 50.0 mm. Inner radius: 30.0 mm. Extrusion depth: 15.0 mm. Hole diameter: 10.0 mm (radius 5.0 mm).
